title: adminpanel
description: This is a small adminGUI where you can teleport players and more
body:
This is a small adminGUI where you can teleport players and more. 
-Heal
-feed 
-fly
-gamemode (Creative, Survival)
- Day/Night
- weather system
- reload
- tp
- coords tp
- Broadcast
- TP-here 
- Troll system
 
  
  
  ![admin-menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c951c6727aca3fe6cfc283bee5971befff5c3e2a.png)



commands:
  admin:
    description: Öffnet das Admin-Menü
    permission: admin.menu

permissions:
  admin.menu:
    description: Menü öffnen
    default: op

  admin.heal:
    description: Heal
    default: op
  admin.feed:
    description: Feed
    default: op
  admin.fly:
    description: Fly toggeln
    default: op
  admin.gamemode:
    description: Gamemode change
    default: op
  admin.time:
    description: Tag/Nacht ändern
    default: op
  admin.weather:
    description: Wetter ändern
    default: op
  admin.reload:
    description: Server reload
    default: op

  admin.tp:
    description: TP zu Spieler
    default: op
  admin.tpcoords:
    description: TP zu Koordinaten
    default: op
  admin.broadcast:
    description: Globaler Broadcast senden
    default: op
  admin.tphere:
    description: Spieler zu dir teleportieren
    default: op
  admin.troll:
    description: Troll nutzen
    default: op
